examples: Its snow-white houses nestle cosily in a sea of fresh green vegetation.
The utility model relates to a hat which can be safely and cosily worn.
A Dog looking out for its afternoon nap jumped into the Manger of an Ox and lay there cosily upon the straw.
That allowed him to send text messages, bypassing the local media which are cosily tied to the established parties.
United and American control 80% of the gates at O'Hare and 89% of the passenger traffic, a cosily profitable arrangement for both.
